nasb.text: For just as we have many members in one body and all the members do not have the same function,

esv.text: For as in one body we have many members, and the members do not all have the same function,

cnv.text: 就像一個身體有許多肢體，各肢體都有不同的功用；

ccb.text: 就像我们身体的各部分有不同的功能，

csbs.text: 正如我们一个身体有很多部分，而且各部分都有不同的功用；
